[lamonae] Cream Lemon - 19 - Demonic Doll (uncensored)
description:
Hi fellow perverts,  
  
here comes another release from the lazy folks of [\#lamonae@irc.rizon.net](irc://irc.rizon.net/lamonae), which follows the path of previous episode in terms of creepiness.   
  
It's around Xmas time, but the present that Hiromu found wandering on the streets, is nothing but a friendly one. The girl he met looks like a girl his older sister knows, but with the exact same appearance as she was five years ago, when she disappeared from school! How is it possible? Why Hiromu is becoming so fascinated by this girl? Will #lamonae ever manage to release an episode without typos?  
  
The animation and character design are from the same person who did Happening Summer and Narisu Scramble before, so you should be familiar with them.   
As with episode 18, it was imported in USA, in an heavily edited form as part of the "Pandora" trilogy of "Brothers Grime" fame. But this time we could manage to replace all censored shots with uncensored ones, so enjoy another uncensored release!  
  
![Image](http://lamonae.free.fr/lemon/ep19.jpg)
